entry_points.name: Cloudflare Worker
entry_points.summary: Default Worker export with fetch handler for health, coach, preflight, and 404 routes.

entry_points.name: Wrangler config
entry_points.summary: Declares Worker main, compatibility date, AI Search binding, and environment vars.

entry_points.name: Phoenix QLoRA trainer
entry_points.summary: CLI-driven Unsloth QLoRA supervised fine-tuning script.

routes.name: POST /api/coach
routes.summary: Main coaching API route that retrieves KB context and dispatches to an LLM provider.

apis.name: Workers AI via Cloudflare REST/Gateway
apis.summary: Calls Cloudflare account AI chat completions endpoint with cf-aig-gateway-id.

apis.name: Azure OpenAI via Cloudflare AI Gateway
apis.summary: Calls Cloudflare AI Gateway Azure OpenAI provider-native route with Azure API key.

modules.name: Env
modules.summary: Worker environment binding and variable contract.

modules.name: handleCoach
modules.summary: Main API implementation for coach request parsing, retrieval, prompt construction, provider dispatch, and response formatting.

modules.name: corsHeaders
modules.summary: Builds CORS response headers from ALLOWED_ORIGIN.

modules.name: apply_chat_template
modules.summary: Converts ChatML messages into model-specific text using the tokenizer chat template.

tests.name: TypeScript typecheck
tests.summary: npm run typecheck invokes tsc --noEmit; passed during map generation.

tests.name: Fine-tuning test dataset
tests.summary: 218 ChatML examples used as model test data, not an automated Worker test harness.

config.name: wrangler.jsonc
config.summary: Cloudflare Worker, AI Search binding, and environment vars.

config.name: tsconfig.json
config.summary: Strict ES2022 TypeScript config for Workers.

config.name: .gitignore
config.summary: Excludes node_modules, build outputs, and local secret files.

dependencies.name: typescript
dependencies.summary: TypeScript compiler; current 5.9.3, latest 6.0.3 from npm outdated.

dependencies.name: wrangler
dependencies.summary: Cloudflare Workers CLI; current 3.114.17, latest 4.95.0, with audit findings through transitive dev dependencies.

ownership.name: Worker runtime
ownership.summary: Runtime API, retrieval, prompt, and provider routing.

ownership.name: Knowledge base
ownership.summary: Source-grounding content for Vitruvian, safety, hypertrophy, and nutrition.

ownership.name: Fine-tuning assets
ownership.summary: ChatML datasets for supervised fine-tuning and evaluation.

risk_areas.name: Debug prompt leakage
risk_areas.summary: Request-controlled debug output can expose systemPrompt, chunks, and retrieval errors.

risk_areas.name: Outdated vulnerable dev toolchain
risk_areas.summary: npm audit reports 5 vulnerabilities through wrangler/miniflare transitive deps; fix is wrangler 4.95.0 semver-major.
